creator: ish@amail.plala.or.jp
text:
It is good working on 11.0-BETA2-p1 but I was encountered panic boot 2 times in a week.
First time, I don't use iwm driver and running 'pkg upgrade' for updating 10.3 to 11.0, but I don't set dumpdev and no debug information is not gotten.
Second time, page fault before login prompt at the boot time, the crash dump is as follows.

# freebsd-version -ku
11.0-BETA2
11.0-BETA2-p1
# cat info.0

  Dump Parity: 4275312696
  Bounds: 0
  Dump Status: good
# head -411 vmcore.0
